# Update Checklist

1. Confirm whether the change is only shelf metadata, or also requires Obsidian sync.
2. Search `~/Documents/codeStore/obsidian/阅读/` for a matching snapshot file.
3. Update `projects/reading-shelf/data/books-data.js`.
4. Keep the title ordering intentional; do not reorder the entire shelf unless asked.
5. Make sure `notes` matches the visible collision list count when collisions are shown.
6. Validate `projects/reading-shelf/index.html` after edits.
7. Open the page and test at least one filter chip.
8. In the final report, separate: what changed in shelf data, what came from Obsidian, and what still needs manual cover input.
